description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node Docker image. Define a single stage called deploy and a job named deploy that runs in this stage. In the before_script run `npm install -g firebase-tools --silent`, then in the script run `firebase deploy --token "$FIREBASE_TOKEN" --project "project-3088336015730889357"`. The job should only execute on the master branch and should publish the `app` directory as an artifact. No services, caches, or additional variables are required.
